name: Marriott Bonvoy Bold® Credit Card

verdict.text: Free Marriott points earner with genuinely broad bonus categories

earn_rates.category: Groceries, rideshare, select food delivery, internet/cable/phone & select streaming

earn_note: The 2× bucket is unusually broad for a no-fee card — groceries, rideshare, delivery apps, streaming, and home internet/phone bills all qualify with no stated cap. There's no free night award on this card, unlike the Boundless — its value is built around everyday categories and Pay Yourself Back.

redemption_options.method: Transfer to airline miles (3:1, +5,000 bonus per 60,000 transferred)
Pay Yourself Back (statement credit for airfare/Marriott stays)

points.note: No card-granted free night award to chase here — Pay Yourself Back at $100 per 12,500 points (0.8¢/point) is the best redemption without booking an award stay directly, but it's capped at $750 in statement credits per year (about 93,750 points). A larger balance still needs a real hotel stay to cash out at full value.

transfer_partners.highlight: Marriott Bonvoy transfers to 40+ airline programs at 3:1, with a 5,000-mile bonus for every 60,000 points transferred in a single transaction — same chart as every other Bonvoy card.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: No confirmed recent changes to the airline transfer chart.

credits.name: Pay Yourself Back
credits.subtitle: $100 per 12,500 pts · $750/yr cap · airfare & Marriott stays
credits.description: Redeem Marriott Bonvoy points for statement credits toward airline tickets or Marriott hotel stays at a rate of $100 per 12,500 points (0.8¢/point), up to $750 in total redemptions per year.
tips: The best redemption rate on this card without transferring points or booking an award stay directly.
The $750/yr cap means roughly 93,750 points is the most you can cash out this way in a calendar year.

credits.name: DoorDash DashPass + Credit
credits.subtitle: 1-yr complimentary + $10/qtr non-restaurant · thru 2027
credits.description: One year of complimentary DashPass membership plus up to $10 off quarterly on non-restaurant DoorDash orders, active through December 31, 2027.
tips: Skip this if you're not already a DoorDash user — not worth chasing on its own.

protection_note: Nearly identical insurance to the paid Boundless card — baggage delay, lost luggage, trip delay, and purchase protection are all present at the same limits, which is a pleasant surprise for $0. Neither Chase Marriott card offers trip cancellation or rental car coverage.
rental_note: No rental car coverage at all — use a different card for rentals.

status_perks.name: Marriott Bonvoy Silver Elite Status
status_perks.note: Complimentary with the card — priority late checkout where available and 10% bonus points on stays. Only 5 Elite Night Credits/year (cut from 15 in a 2025 change), below the Boundless's automatic count.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

services.name: Visa Signature Concierge
services.detail: Complimentary 24/7 concierge for reservations, tickets, and travel arrangements.

additional_cards.title: Additional Cards

benefits.text: Earns Marriott Bonvoy points on their spend (into your account)
Does not get their own Silver Elite status independently

additional_cards.note: Additional cards are free — an easy way to pool household spend toward the 3× hotel rate and Pay Yourself Back redemptions.

timeline.text: Welcome offer changed to 60,000 points after $1,000 spend in 3 months (30,000 more than the prior offer), replacing a temporary 2-Free-Night promotional offer.
Elite Night Credit allotment cut from 15/year to 5/year.
